chatbot.title: AI Chatbot
chatbot.subtitle: Configure AI-powered bots for customer messaging and internal team assistance.

overview.title: AI Overview
overview.description: At-a-glance status and health of every AI feature.
overview.failoverHint: Live quota per model from Groq. When the top model runs out, requests fall back to the next one and return automatically once it resets.
overview.noQuotaData: No usage yet — quota appears after the first message.

customerBot.title: Customer WhatsApp Bot
customerBot.description: Automatically replies to incoming WhatsApp messages from customers.
customerBot.enableDesc: Master switch for the WhatsApp auto-reply bot
customerBot.replyAllDesc: Bot answers all customers automatically — no need to enable it per contact. A human reply still pauses it.
customerBot.pauseDesc: Temporarily stops the bot when a human agent takes over the conversation
customerBot.pauseDurationDesc: How long to pause after a human agent replies

crmAssistant.title: CRM Assistant (Internal)
crmAssistant.description: The floating assistant bubble that helps your team navigate and use the CRM.
crmAssistant.enableDesc: Shows the AI chat bubble for all logged-in team members
crmAssistant.sameProviderDesc: Use the same AI provider settings as the customer bot

leadQualification.title: AI Lead Qualification
leadQualification.description: Automatically analyzes customer conversations to score leads, detect buying intent, and surface high-priority opportunities. Reuses the provider & API key from the Customer Bot.
leadQualification.enableDesc: Analyze 1-to-1 conversations and qualify customers (groups are excluded)
leadQualification.providerNote: Uses the same AI provider and API key configured under Customer Bot — only the model, prompt, and tuning below are specific to qualification.
leadQualification.modelDesc: A cheaper/faster model is usually fine for classification
leadQualification.debounceDesc: How long to wait after the last customer message before re-analyzing. Avoids one API call per message during a burst.
leadQualification.contextWindowDesc: How many recent messages are sent to the AI for each analysis
leadQualification.systemPromptDesc: Instructs the AI how to classify and score. Must keep returning the same JSON shape — edit with care.
leadQualification.systemPromptPlaceholder: You are a senior sales analyst…

chatbot.systemPromptPlaceholder: Describe how the bot should behave when replying to customers…
chatbot.crmSystemPromptDesc: What the floating assistant knows about your CRM
chatbot.crmSystemPromptPlaceholder: Describe the CRM features and how the assistant should help your team…
chatbot.crmApiKeyPlaceholder: Leave blank to use the same key
chatbot.separateConfigDesc: Use a different API key or model for the CRM assistant

strict.title: Strict Controls
strict.contextWindowDesc: Number of past messages the AI reads before replying (3–20)
strict.ignoreFirstDesc: Skip the very first inbound message — gives agents a chance to handle new leads manually
strict.fallbackDesc: Sent when the AI returns no answer or an error occurs. Leave blank to send nothing.
strict.fallbackPlaceholder: Sorry, I couldn't understand that. A team member will get back to you shortly.

businessHours.title: Business Hours
businessHours.enableDesc: Bot will only respond during the configured time window
businessHours.offHoursPlaceholder: Thanks for reaching out! We're currently closed. Our hours are 9 AM – 6 PM. We'll get back to you soon.
businessHours.offHoursDesc: Sent when a message arrives outside business hours. Leave blank to stay silent.

escalation.title: Escalation & Handoff
escalation.keywordsDesc: Comma-separated words. If any appear in an inbound message, the bot pauses and hands off to a human agent.
escalation.messagePlaceholder: I'm connecting you with a team member right away. Please hold on.
escalation.messageDesc: Sent to the customer the moment escalation is triggered.
escalation.hint: Add escalation keywords above to configure this section. When a customer uses one of these words, the bot pauses and a human agent takes over.

chatbot.accessDenied: Admin access required to configure AI settings.

connection.note: Provider and API key are shared by the customer bot, the CRM assistant, and lead qualification. Everything else about the customer bot — behavior, audience, and when it answers — lives in the builder below.

users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: Create, edit, and manage all user accounts and their roles.
users.noUsersFiltered: No users match the current filters.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete User
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete this user?

teams.title: Team Management
teams.subtitle: Create teams, assign members, and organize your workforce.
teams.noTeams: No teams yet. Create one to get started.
teams.deleteConfirm: Delete team "{{name}}"? Members will be unassigned.
